prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约2296→2283→1463→784→550，位次连续5年大幅前移，累计前移约1746名，竞争持续加剧；2025年基准位次约550名；本省物理类计划2021年119人、2022年104人、2023年79人、2024年57人、2025年30人，呈持续大幅缩招趋势；2026年计划30人，与2025年持平，缩招趋势暂停。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第12名（Top20），近年排名稳定在第11–16名区间，属于国内顶尖工科强校；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第10（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度持续较高；2024年曾出现投档线异常讨论但已平息；第五轮学科评估A-及以上17个，包括力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、控制科学与工程A、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A等，工科实力极强，与招生专业高度匹配。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续大幅前移（主因持续缩招）、2026年招生计划持平、学校顶尖层次与优势学科吸引力强、抖音高热反映报考关注不减、本省考生总数小幅增加等因素，在2025年基准550名基础上，供需关系基本稳定，预计2026年最低位次约538名，区间472–604名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2296 → 2283 → 1463 → 784 → 550, with rankings moving significantly forward for five consecutive years, accumulating a forward shift of about 1746 places, indicating intensifying competition; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 550; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 119 in 2021, 104 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 57 in 2024, and 30 in 2025, showing a continuous and significant reduction trend; the 2026 plan is 30, unchanged from 2025, pausing the reduction trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 11th–16th range in recent years, belonging to the top domestic engineering strong schools; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 10th (high heat), with large short video exposure and sustained high application attention; in 2024, there was an abnormal discussion about the admission cutoff but it has subsided; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 17 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering, A in Control Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, etc., with extremely strong engineering strength, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors at HIT such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering are all highly recommended or recommended, with high social popularity; the total number of examinees in Hebei Province in 2026 is about 609,800, with an estimated Physics Category of about 364,660 based on recent proportions, a slight increase of about 1,620 compared to 2025 (363,040), slightly intensifying competition; Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province, not a local university in Hebei, but as a top national 985, its cross-provincial enrollment appeal is strong, and regional factors have limited impact on application heat.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous significant forward shift in historical rankings (mainly due to continuous enrollment reduction), the 2026 enrollment plan being flat, the top-tier level and advantageous disciplines of the school attracting strong interest, high Douyin heat reflecting sustained application attention, and a slight increase in the total number of provincial examinees, based on the 2025 baseline of 550, the supply-demand relationship is basically stable. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be about 538, with a range of 472–604.

For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice (Future Technology Top Talent Class, Academician Special Class, AI Advanced Technology Leading Class), Tier 1 (Top Class/HKU Excellence Class, AI Academician Special Class) can be used as a sprint, and Tier 3 (Shenzhen Top Talent Class, new special classes) as a safety net. HIT's Physics Category only enrolls 30 students in 2026, with extremely intense competition. Candidates with rankings within 500 are advised to seriously consider Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1208 → 1424 → 1557 → 931 → 1005, with significant fluctuations. In 2024, it moved sharply forward to 931, then slightly backward to 1005 in 2025, with a recent two-year baseline around 1005. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 6 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 20 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 10, a 50% reduction from 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 12th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with top-tier comprehensive strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Ranked 10th in Douyin comprehensive popularity (high heat), indicating high application attention. HIT is known for engineering, and the Economics and Management Experimental Class available to History Category corresponds to Management Science and Engineering (A grade) and Business Administration (not individually rated but supported by engineering management background). Overall, the academic strength is robust.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Economics and Management majors is divided and rational, with finance/management application heat becoming more moderate. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in Hebei Province is approximately 245,140, a slight increase from 2025 (243,714). Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province, not a local university in Hebei, but as a top national 985, its cross-provincial recruitment appeal is strong.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuations in historical rankings, the significant 50% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the top-tier university level, high attention reflected by Douyin heat, and a slight increase in the total number of History Category examinees, based on the 2025 baseline of 1005, the enrollment reduction will push the ranking forward (smaller number). However, the 2025 ranking has already shown a backward trend, and the popularity of Economics and Management majors is divided. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be approximately 734, with a range of 646–822.

History Category has only one Economics and Management Experimental Class category (enrolling 10 students), with internal majors freely selectable. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to actively apply; if your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 646), you can boldly choose; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (822), you can consider it as a reach. This category includes Business Administration, Accounting, Law, Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, and multiple dual-degree programs, offering considerable choice.
